transforms.name: vite:vue
vite:css
transforms.result: nav{background-color:rgba(23,23,32,.8)!important;height:98px;left:0;min-height:59px;padding:20px;position:absolute;right:0;top:0;z-index:2}nav .navbar{align-items:center;background:transparent;display:flex;height:59px;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 .5rem;position:relative}@media (max-width:576px){nav .navbar{height:45px}}nav .navbar .burger{color:#fff;display:none;margin:20px 0;position:absolute;right:0}@media (max-width:576px){nav .navbar .burger{display:block}}nav .navbar .navbar-item{align-items:center;display:flex;font-size:.8rem;gap:50px;text-transform:uppercase}@media (max-width:576px){nav .navbar .navbar-item{display:none}}nav .navbar .navbar-start{align-items:center;display:flex}nav .navbar .navbar-start .navbar-brand{padding-left:.5rem}nav .navbar .navbar-start .navbar-brand img{display:block;max-width:200px}nav .navbar .languageBar-switcher{align-items:center;border-radius:6px;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:space-between;padding:5px 10px;transition:all .1s ease-out}@media (max-width:576px){nav .navbar .languageBar-switcher{display:none}}.has-dropdrown{position:relative}.has-dropdrown .dropdrown{background-color:rgba(23,23,32,.4);border-radius:5px;box-shadow:0 0 10px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.1);display:grid;float:left;gap:15px;left:0;padding:1rem;position:absolute;top:3.25rem;z-index:999}.has-dropdrown .dropdrown li{color:#fff;display:flex;font-size:.7rem;padding:10px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:all .1s ease-in-out}.has-dropdrown .dropdrown li i{height:auto;margin-right:10px;width:20px}button{text-transform:uppercase}.mobile-navbar{position:relative}.mobile-navbar .navbar-bg{background-color:rgba(0,0,0,.3);height:100%;left:0;position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:9}.mobile-navbar .navbar-container{background-color:#fff;bottom:0;left:3.25rem;padding:20px;position:fixed;right:0;top:0;z-index:999}.mobile-navbar .navbar-container .navbar-header{align-items:center;display:flex;padding-bottom:10px}.mobile-navbar .navbar-container .navbar-header i{cursor:pointer}.mobile-navbar .navbar-container .navbar-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding-top:20px}.mobile-navbar .navbar-container .navbar-list li{list-style:none;padding:5px 0;transition:all .1s ease-in-out}.mobile-navbar .navbar-container .navbar-list li .navbar-item{cursor:pointer;display:flex;text-decoration:none}.mobile-navbar .navbar-container .navbar-list li .navbar-item i{display:block;height:30px;margin-right:.5rem;width:30px}.mobile-navbar .navbar-container .navbar-list li:nth-child(8){margin-top:1rem}
